mapper.sql: select d.document_id as documentId, d.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, d.directory_id as directoryId, sd.directory_name as directoryName, d.document_name as documentName, d.document_type as documentType, d.storage_key as storageKey, d.version_no as versionNo, d.source_type as sourceType, d.uploaded_by as uploadedBy, d.uploaded_time as uploadedTime, d.file_size as fileSize, d.checksum, d.compliance_status as complianceStatus, d.archive_status as archiveStatus, d.check_comment as checkComment, d.deleted_flag as deletedFlag, d.create_by as createBy, d.create_time as createTime, d.update_by as updateBy, d.update_time as updateTime, d.remark from inf_project_document d left join inf_project p on p.project_id = d.project_id left join inf_project_space_directory sd on sd.directory_id = d.directory_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from inf_project_document where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted_flag = '0'
select count(1) from inf_project_document where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted_flag = '0' and compliance_status = 'PASSED'
select count(1) from inf_project_document where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted_flag = '0' and archive_status = 'ARCHIVED'
